opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: When running agents at the OS level, you'll find that tool latency becomes secondary to permission model complexity—users rarely trust granular access grants for background agents. Consider implementing a "tool sandbox" that mediates agent-to-system calls rather than granting direct access, otherwise you're creating a persistent attack surface that degrades system stability over time.
actions.reasoning: I've built multi-agent systems with tool orchestration and have shipped production agent frameworks that handle tool execution, context management, and self-improvement loops.
